categories.title: Sandwiches & Wraps
categories.note: Fast-moving handhelds with crisp texture, bright finishes, and big flavor.

items.name: The Flux Capacitor
items.description: Crispy chicken breast fried in coconut oil with Flux Ex sauce and pickles on toasted brioche.

items.name: The Velocity Sub
items.description: Roasted chicken or smoked turkey breast with bean sprouts, pickled onions, and Flux Fire dusting on a toasted hoagie.

items.name: The Kinetic Wrap
items.description: Grilled chicken, baby spinach, cucumber ribbons, and Flux Ex spread in a spinach tortilla.

items.name: The Hummus Pulse Wrap
items.description: House hummus, bean sprouts, shredded purple cabbage, and bell peppers finished with Citrus Spark.

items.name: Classic Chicken Sub
items.description: A straightforward toasted artisan roll option built for speed.

items.name: Gutbuster Sub
items.description: A heartier toasted artisan roll built for a bigger appetite.

categories.title: Boxes & Combos
categories.note: Carryout-ready builds designed to move hot, fast, and satisfy on the first bite.

items.name: The Heavyweight Flux Box
items.description: Choose fried chicken, smoked turkey, or crispy tofu over a bed of fresh-cut Tornado Fries with Flux Ex and Citrus Spark.

items.name: The Stuffed Tornado Box
items.description: Spiral-cut Tornado Fries stuffed with shredded protein and bean sprouts, dusted in Flux Fire.

items.name: The Unstuffed Tornado Box
items.description: A mountain of coconut-oil-fried Tornado Fries topped with Flux Fire and a Flux Ex drizzle.

items.name: Crave Combo
items.description: Choose tenders or whole chicken wings with signature slaw and a Lemon Shaker.

items.name: Workday Lunch Box
items.description: Weekday lunch special with small slaw and a 12oz Lemon Shaker.

items.name: Family Crunch Pack
items.description: Twelve tenders or twelve whole chicken wings with large slaw and a 64oz Lemon Shaker.

categories.title: Salads & Bowls
categories.note: Fresh builds that keep the wellness-forward side of the brand visible without sacrificing flavor.

items.name: Holistic Health Salad
items.description: A nutrient-dense base of kale and bean sprouts topped with shredded carrots and radishes.

items.name: The Alkaline Flux Bowl
items.description: Quinoa, baby spinach, cherry tomatoes, and cucumber ribbons with Citrus Spark vinaigrette.

items.name: The Crave Cleanse
items.description: Purple cabbage, bell peppers, roasted chickpeas, Flux Fire, and a side of hummus.

items.name: The Tofu Torque
items.description: Cubed crispy tofu, bean sprouts, kale, and bell peppers with a Flux Ex drizzle.

items.name: The Gobbler Glow
items.description: Smoked turkey, baby spinach, radishes, and cucumbers with a Citrus Spark spritz.

items.name: The Sea Moss Super-Bowl
items.description: A powerhouse mix of prep-table vegetables, quinoa, and a two-ounce dollop of raw sea moss gel.

items.name: House Salad
items.description: Garden salad with cheese and croutons.

items.name: Full Meal Salad
items.description: Choose grilled or crispy chicken on a full salad build.

items.name: Exclusive Chopped Salad & Sub Combo
items.description: Half salad and half sub for a quick split-plate lunch.

categories.title: Whole Chicken Wings

items.name: Crispy Tenders - 3 Piece
items.description: All-white meat, hand-breaded.

items.name: Crispy Tenders - 6 Piece
items.description: All-white meat, hand-breaded.

items.name: Whole Fried Wings - 3 Piece
items.description: Original, Lemon Pepper, or Teriyaki.

items.name: Whole Fried Wings - 6 Piece
items.description: Original, Lemon Pepper, or Teriyaki.

items.name: Whole Fried Wings - Party Platter
items.description: Twenty-four pieces for group orders and game-day runs.

categories.title: Sips
categories.note: Cold signature pours that finish the order cleanly and keep the brand memorable.

items.name: Lemon Shaker 32oz
items.description: Bright, cold, citrus-forward refreshment built for carryout.

categories.title: Apothecary Boosters
categories.note: Herbalist-informed add-ons and wellness-forward extensions that make the brand distinctive.

items.name: Flux Sea Moss Gel
items.description: Wild-crafted, multi-mineral sea moss gel in Gold or Purple.

items.name: Medicinal Herbal Tinctures
items.description: High-potency extracts designed for immunity, energy, or focus.

items.name: Drink Drop-In
